title: Alexander's Translucent Armor
description: Changes the chestplate, pants and helmet to a more minimal look while still having a vanilla texture.
body:
## Introducing Alexander's Translucent Armor!
This texture pack changes is made since I found no other ones of this type which I like. These are the textures which this pack changes:
- Helmet (Back)
- Chestplate (Opened Front)
- Leggins/Pants (Smaller)
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
